refinedSummary: Campus unrest reported at State University, Student Center, Floor 2. Large crowd gathering has turned violent with reports of property damage. Hostel blocks A and C are closest to the disturbance. 3,200 students on campus. Campus security is outnumbered and requesting backup. Lockdown of academic buildings recommended while hostel wardens secure residential blocks.

multiLanguageSummaries.en: UNREST at State University Student Center. Violent crowd, property damage. Campus lockdown initiated.
multiLanguageSummaries.hi: राज्य विश्वविद्यालय में अशांति। हिंसक भीड़, संपत्ति को नुकसान। कैंपस लॉकडाउन शुरू।
multiLanguageSummaries.ta: மாநிலப் பல்கலையில் கலவரம். வன்முறைக் கூட்டம். வளாக லாக்டவுன் தொடங்கியது.
multiLanguageSummaries.te: స్టేట్ యూనివర్సిటీలో అశాంతి. హింసాత్మక గుంపు. క్యాంపస్ లాక్‌డౌన్ ప్రారంభమైంది.
multiLanguageSummaries.mr: राज्य विद्यापीठात अशांतता. हिंसक जमाव. कॅम्पस लॉकडाउन सुरू.
multiLanguageSummaries.bn: রাজ্য বিশ্ববিদ্যালয়ে অশান্তি। হিংসাত্মক জনতা। ক্যাম্পাস লকডাউন শুরু।

suggestedProtocolDeltas: Deploy campus CCTV monitoring team to track crowd movement in real-time
Secure laboratory buildings containing hazardous materials
Activate emergency SMS broadcast to all registered student numbers
Coordinate with local police for a measured response to avoid escalation

meshEventRecommendations.reason: Violent campus unrest — nearby schools should lockdown as a precaution until situation is contained.
Students displaced from hostels near disturbance may need temporary shelter.
